root.description: Determines whether cluster resources will be created
root.name: create

root.description: Determines whether to create SASL/SCRAM secret association
root.name: create_scram_secret_association

root.description: The distribution of broker nodes across availability zones ([documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/msk/1.0/apireference/clusters.html#clusters-model-brokerazdistribution)). Currently the only valid value is `DEFAULT`
root.name: broker_node_az_distribution

root.description: Specify the desired Kafka software version
root.name: kafka_version

root.description: Name of the S3 bucket to deliver logs to
root.name: s3_logs_bucket

root.description: Map of VPC Connections to create
root.name: vpc_connections
root.type:
map(object({
    authentication  = string
    client_subnets  = list(string)
    security_groups = list(string)
    vpc_id          = string
    tags            = optional(map(string), {})
  }))

root.description: List of AWS Secrets Manager secret ARNs to associate with SCRAM
root.name: scram_secret_association_secret_arn_list

root.description: Map of MSK topics to create
root.name: topics

root.description: A map of tags to assign to the resources created
root.name: tags

root.description: The desired total number of broker nodes in the kafka cluster. It must be a multiple of the number of specified client subnets
root.name: number_of_broker_nodes

root.description: Contents of the server.properties file. Supported properties are documented in the [MSK Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/msk/latest/developerguide/msk-configuration-properties.html)
root.name: configuration_server_properties

root.description: Override policy documents for cluster policy
root.name: cluster_override_policy_documents

root.description: Determines whether autoscaling is enabled for storage
root.name: enable_storage_autoscaling

root.description: The ARN of the IAM role that allows Application AutoScaling to modify your scalable target on your behalf. This defaults to an IAM Service-Linked Role
root.name: scaling_role_arn

root.description: A map of schema registries to be created
root.name: schema_registries

root.description: Determines whether to create connect worker configuration
root.name: create_connect_worker_configuration

root.description: A list of subnets to connect to in client VPC ([documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/msk/1.0/apireference/clusters.html#clusters-prop-brokernodegroupinfo-clientsubnets))
root.name: broker_node_client_subnets

root.description: A list of the security groups to associate with the elastic network interfaces to control who can communicate with the cluster
root.name: broker_node_security_groups

root.description: Indicates whether you want to enable or disable streaming broker logs to Cloudwatch Logs
root.name: cloudwatch_logs_enabled

root.description: Determines whether to create an MSK cluster policy
root.name: create_cluster_policy

root.description: Specify the instance type to use for the kafka brokers. e.g. kafka.m5.large. ([Pricing info](https://aws.amazon.com/msk/pricing/))
root.name: broker_node_instance_type

root.description: Configuration block for specifying a client authentication
root.name: client_authentication

root.description: Specifies the log class of the log group. Possible values are: STANDARD or INFREQUENT_ACCESS.
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_class

root.description: The Kafka broker storage utilization at which scaling is initiated
root.name: scaling_target_value

root.description: Region where this resource will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: Configuration block for intelligent rebalancing
root.name: rebalancing

root.description: ARN of an externally created configuration to use
root.name: configuration_arn

root.description: Name of the Cloudwatch Log Group to deliver logs to
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_name

root.description: Contents of connect-distributed.properties file. The value can be either base64 encoded or in raw format
root.name: connect_worker_config_properties_file_content

root.description: Name of the configuration
root.name: configuration_name

root.description: Indicates whether you want to enable or disable the Node Exporter
root.name: node_exporter_enabled

root.description: You may specify a KMS key short ID or ARN (it will always output an ARN) to use for encrypting your data at rest. If no key is specified, an AWS managed KMS ('aws/msk' managed service) key will be used for encrypting the data at rest
root.name: encryption_at_rest_kms_key_arn

root.description: Indicates whether you want to enable or disable streaming broker logs to Kinesis Data Firehose
root.name: firehose_logs_enabled

root.description: Prefix to append to the folder name
root.name: s3_logs_prefix

root.description: Indicates whether you want to enable or disable the JMX Exporter
root.name: jmx_exporter_enabled

root.description: Controls storage mode for supported storage tiers. Valid values are: `LOCAL` or `TIERED`
root.name: storage_mode

root.description: Source policy documents for cluster policy
root.name: cluster_source_policy_documents

root.description: Determines whether to create a CloudWatch log group
root.name: create_cloudwatch_log_group

root.description: Information about the cluster access configuration
root.name: broker_node_connectivity_info

root.description: Determines whether to create a configuration
root.name: create_configuration

root.description: Specifies the number of days you want to retain log events in the log group
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_retention_in_days

root.description: Map of custom plugin configuration details (map of maps)
root.name: connect_custom_plugins

root.description: Description of the configuration
root.name: configuration_description

root.description: Max storage capacity for Kafka broker autoscaling
root.name: scaling_max_capacity

root.description: The ARN of the KMS Key to use when encrypting log data
root.name: cloudwatch_log_group_kms_key_id

root.description: Determines whether to create a Glue schema registry for managing Avro schemas for the cluster
root.name: create_schema_registry

root.description: A map schemas to be created within the schema registry
root.name: schemas
root.type:
map(object({
    schema_name          = string
    schema_registry_name = string
    description          = optional(string)
    data_format          = optional(string, "AVRO")
    compatibility        = string
    schema_definition    = string
    tags                 = optional(map(string), {})
  }))

root.description: A summary description of the worker configuration
root.name: connect_worker_config_description

root.description: Name of the MSK cluster
root.name: name

root.description: Whether data communication among broker nodes is encrypted. Default value: `true`
root.name: encryption_in_transit_in_cluster

root.description: Specify the desired enhanced MSK CloudWatch monitoring level. See [Monitoring Amazon MSK with Amazon CloudWatch](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/msk/latest/developerguide/monitoring.html)
root.name: enhanced_monitoring

root.description: Map of policy statements for cluster policy
root.name: cluster_policy_statements

root.description: The name of the worker configuration
root.name: connect_worker_config_name

root.description: A block that contains information about storage volumes attached to MSK broker nodes
root.name: broker_node_storage_info

root.description: Name of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to deliver logs to
root.name: firehose_delivery_stream

root.description: Indicates whether you want to enable or disable streaming broker logs to S3
root.name: s3_logs_enabled

root.description: Encryption setting for data in transit between clients and brokers. Valid values: `TLS`, `TLS_PLAINTEXT`, and `PLAINTEXT`. Default value is `TLS`
root.name: encryption_in_transit_client_broker

root.description: Create, update, and delete timeout configurations for the cluster
root.name: timeouts

root.description: Revision of the externally created configuration to use
root.name: configuration_revision

serverless.description: Specifies up to five security groups that control inbound and outbound traffic for the serverless cluster
serverless.name: security_group_ids

serverless.description: A list of subnets in at least two different Availability Zones that host your client applications
serverless.name: subnet_ids

serverless.description: A map of tags to assign to the resources created
serverless.name: tags

serverless.description: Determines whether to create an MSK cluster policy
serverless.name: create_cluster_policy

serverless.description: Source policy documents for cluster policy
serverless.name: cluster_source_policy_documents

serverless.description: Map of policy statements for cluster policy
serverless.name: cluster_policy_statements

serverless.description: Determines whether cluster resources will be created
serverless.name: create

root.description: Comma separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs of Kafka brokers suitable to bootstrap connectivity to the Kafka cluster
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_vpc_connectivity

root.description: Name of the MSK cluster

root.name: zookeeper_connect_string_tls

root.name: bootstrap_brokers_public_sasl_iam

root.description: A map of output attributes for the VPC connections created
root.name: vpc_connections

root.description: The scaling policy's name
root.name: appautoscaling_policy_name

root.description: A map of output attributes for the MSK topics created

root.name: connect_custom_plugins

root.description: The scaling policy's type
root.name: appautoscaling_policy_policy_type

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and SASL SCRAM port pairs
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_public_sasl_scram

root.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the configuration
root.name: configuration_arn

root.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MSK cluster
root.name: scram_secret_association_id

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) specifying the log group
root.name: log_group_arn

root.description: A comma separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs to use to connect to the Apache Zookeeper cluster. The returned values are sorted alphabetically
root.name: zookeeper_connect_string

root.description: An ID of the latest successfully created revision of the worker configuration
root.name: connect_worker_configuration_latest_revision

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and SASL IAM port pairs for VPC connectivity
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_vpc_connectivity_sasl_iam

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and SASL SCRAM port pairs for VPC connectivity
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_vpc_connectivity_sasl_scram

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and SASL IAM port pairs. This attribute will have a value if `encryption_in_transit_client_broker` is set to `TLS_PLAINTEXT` or `TLS` and `client_authentication_sasl_iam` is set to `true`
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_sasl_iam

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and TLS port pairs
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_public_tls

root.description: Latest revision of the configuration
root.name: configuration_latest_revision

root.description: A map of output attributes for the schema registries created
root.name: schema_registries

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and SASL SCRAM port pairs. This attribute will have a value if `encryption_in_transit_client_broker` is set to `TLS_PLAINTEXT` or `TLS` and `client_authentication_sasl_scram` is set to `true`
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_sasl_scram

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and TLS port pairs. This attribute will have a value if `encryption_in_transit_client_broker` is set to `TLS_PLAINTEXT` or `TLS`
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_tls

root.description: One or more DNS names (or IP addresses) and TLS port pairs for VPC connectivity
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_vpc_connectivity_tls

root.description: UUID of the MSK cluster, for use in IAM policies
root.name: cluster_uuid

root.description: Current version of the MSK Cluster used for updates, e.g. `K13V1IB3VIYZZH`
root.name: current_version

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the worker configuration
root.name: connect_worker_configuration_arn

root.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MSK cluster
root.name: arn

root.description: Comma separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs of Kafka brokers suitable to bootstrap connectivity to the Kafka cluster
root.name: bootstrap_brokers

root.description: Comma separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs of Kafka brokers suitable to bootstrap connectivity to the Kafka cluster. Contains a value if `encryption_in_transit_client_broker` is set to `PLAINTEXT` or `TLS_PLAINTEXT`
root.name: bootstrap_brokers_plaintext

root.description: A map of output attributes for the schemas created
root.name: schemas

serverless.description: The ARN of the serverless cluster
serverless.name: serverless_arn
